buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0A0D14] font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#F0C84B] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-sm hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-white/70 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-sm transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0D14] border border-white/10 text-white placeholder-white/30 rounded-sm focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] transition-all px-4 py-3
inputs.search_bar: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 text-white placeholder-white/40 focus:border-white/30 transition-all

badges.default: bg-white/10 text-white text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full uppercase tracking-widest border border-white/5

hero_background.description: Golden metallic lines against a black background, representing connections.

empty_state_graphic.description: Elegant 3D gold geometric sphere, ideal for 'no contacts found' empty states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global background color is #0A0D14. Setup dark mode strictly.
Use Playfair Display for all major headings. Ensure body text uses Outfit.
Apply 'Crystal Glassmorphism' for the sticky top navigation to overlay smoothly on the hero background.
For the Profile Directory grid, strictly avoid standard Shadcn 'Cards'. Instead, use flat, solid containers with 1px border (#ffffff 5% opacity), padding p-6, and minimal border-radius (rounded-sm).
Avatars must be large, high-resolution and maintain aspect-ratio. Avoid small circles; use large squares (aspect-square) with rounded-sm for high-end fashion/luxury vibe.
Install and use '@phosphor-icons/react' for all app iconography (Duotone weight).
Ensure empty states and placeholder graphics use the provided abstract geometric images with text overlay.
Make sure the 'Save Contact' and 'Copy Info' actions are visually prioritized on the profile page using the primary gold color (#D4AF37).
Remember to add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust testing.
